chunks.text: Biomimetic Millisystems Lab Collaboration Wiki | Main / ZumyStatusMonitor From Biomimetic Millisystems Lab Collaboration Wiki Main: ZumyStatusMonitor Tutorial for using Zumy status monitor. This monitor will be launched when man_joy_override is launc

or will be launched when man_joy_override is launched by roslaunch man_joy_override zumy.launch Topic Monitor On the top of left column, there is Topic Monitor plugin. To view robots connected to host computer, simply check the box next to topic "/on

computer, simply check the box next to topic "/online_detector/alive_robots", it shows all the robots have been connected to host in the next line. To check out the lost robots, similarly check the box next to topic "/online_detector/lost_robots" Ro

ox next to topic "/online_detector/lost_robots" Robot Steering On the right column, there is Robot Steering plugin. To move a Zumy, for example, type /odroid3/cmd_vel in the blank, and move the bars under to drive a Zumy with host name "odroid3" Imag

nder to drive a Zumy with host name "odroid3" Image View On the bottom of the left column, there is Image View plugin, which can be used to watch to images capture from camera. Retrieved from https://wiki.eecs.berkeley.edu/biomimetics/Main/ZumyStatus
